title: Plan erosion and sediment control measures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan erosion and sediment control measures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish suitability of development proposal

pcs.text: Access and analyse development proposal for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and analyse development proposal for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and analyse development proposal for site.

pcs.text: Investigate development site and compile data on suitability for development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate development site and compile data on suitability for development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate development site and compile data on suitability for development.

pcs.text: Consider changes to development proposal, and report to developer or consenting authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider changes to development proposal, and report to developer or consenting authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider changes to development proposal, and report to developer or consenting authority.

pcs.text: Verify development proposal complies with regulatory planning authority and environmental, heritage and cultural legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify development proposal complies with regulatory planning authority and environmental, heritage and cultural legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify development proposal complies with regulatory planning authority and environmental, heritage and cultural legislation.

pcs.text: Confirm development proposal meets erosion and sediment control guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm development proposal meets erosion and sediment control guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm development proposal meets erosion and sediment control guidelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish suitability of development proposal

pcs.text: Apply workplace health and safety and environmentally sustainable practices to strategy

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace health and safety and environmentally sustainable practices to strategy.

pcs.text: Establish erosion and sediment control strategies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document strategies in cooperation with developer and consenting authority.

elements.title: Prepare an erosion and sediment control plan

pcs.text: Check earthwork structures or measures comply with selection criteria and industry guidelines

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop erosion and sediment control plan for site.

pcs.text: Design structures and specifications for erosion and sediment control

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design structures and specifications for erosion and sediment control.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile plans, specifications and documentation into final plan, and verify compliance with industry guidelines.
